localization.TOURS.FellowshipDescription: Learn how the fellowship connects heroes in a group.
localization.TOURS.FellowshipIntroContent: This tour introduces the fellowship — a shared actor that binds your heroes together. Every world has one fellowship, and all heroes are automatically linked to it.
localization.TOURS.FellowshipSheetContent: This is your fellowship sheet. Here you'll add a fellowship theme with power tags, a weakness tag, and a quest — just like a hero's themes. You can also add story themes and story tags.
localization.TOURS.FellowshipSetupContent: To get started, drop a fellowship themebook onto this area. This creates your fellowship's theme, where you'll define the group's shared identity, power tags, and quest.
localization.TOURS.FellowshipSyncContent: Every hero automatically shares the fellowship's theme and tags. When the GM updates the fellowship — adding tags, advancing the theme, or changing the quest — it updates on every hero's sheet automatically.
